name: Communications Agent
description: Dispatches critical-result and report-ready notifications over the configured channels once a study's report is finalized and verified.

skills.name: Dispatch notifications
skills.description: Sends result notifications over configured channels; returns dispatchStatus and per-channel results. When the input carries an `escalation` slice (a fired sign-off ladder rung, #29 -- see escalation-policy.schema.json $defs/dispatchEscalation), its channels override urgency-based selection.
